title: SpaceInvite/set: create does not check space existence before member check
description: jmap.rs space_invite_set create: membership is verified via get_space_member_role(space_id, account_id). If the space does not exist, get_space_member_role returns Ok(None) — which is indistinguishable from 'space exists but caller is not a member'. Both paths return forbidden. This means a caller passing a nonexistent space_id gets a 'forbidden' response instead of 'invalidProperties/notFound', leaking that the space-id-does-not-exist path returns the same error as member-check. Less severe than a security hole but the wrong error type per RFC 8620 §5.3.
